title: striga bilabiata subsp. bilabiata
intro: Striga bilabiata subsp. bilabiata, also known as the African witchweed, is a plant species in the broomrape family (Orobanchaceae). It is a parasitic plant that obtains its nutrients by drawing them from the roots of its host plants. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Striga bilabiata subsp. bilabiata include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and it is also used to prepare herbal teas and infusions.
